_comment: Copy this to plan.json and fill in your own values. plan.json is gitignored.
These are the ONLY figures Mātrā cannot fetch. The Claude Code OAuth token carries
scopes user:profile, user:inference, user:sessions:claude_code, user:mcp_servers,
user:file_upload — and no billing scope. /api/oauth/profile exposes plan tier and
subscription status but no money; /v1/organizations/spend_limits rejects GET (405,
admin-only). Credit balance and invoice history live behind the web billing UI.
Anything set here is rendered on a DASHED tile marked 'declared', never as if it were
live — a number you must remember to update will go stale, and a dashboard that hides
that is a dashboard that lies. Set a field to null to hide its tile.
Everything else needs no config and is fetched live: plan tier, subscription status,
billing type, session/weekly quota percentages, reset times, and the usage-credit
object (balance / used / cap / auto-reload) if you enable credits.
Delete this file entirely and every declared tile simply disappears.
priceUsd      — what your plan costs. Claude Max 5x is $100/mo, Max 20x is $200/mo.
The TIER (5x / 20x) is detected automatically from the API — only the
PRICE has to be declared, because the token carries no billing scope.
billingPeriod — 'month' or 'year'.
renewsOn      — subscription renewal date, YYYY-MM-DD.
creditBalance — billing credit balance in USD.
spentToDate   — lifetime spend, if you want it on the deck.
